title: The Warden of Greyford
target: remove the Warden of Greyford — the petty tyrant who broke Marek's old company — from the watch-tower he holds with twenty pikemen

slots.description: set the plan, hold the party together when it sours
the violence end — door, blade, body in the way
talk, listen, lie to the people inside the tower

approaches.label: Open assault on the tower
approaches.summary: Hit the gate at dawn with everyone you have. Brutal, loud, and over fast — if it works.
approaches.narrativeHint: Mud, blood on the threshold, the smell of pitch. No room for pretty words.

approaches.label: Parley under the Sevrenne sign
approaches.summary: Walk up under truce, ask for terms, take him alive if you can. Imogen carries the cult's authority into the room.
approaches.narrativeHint: Cold light through narrow windows. A man who has read too many ledgers, and the silence between two sentences.

approaches.label: Poison the well, take the tower at dusk
approaches.summary: Veska puts taintroot in the cistern before the night-meal. By the late watch half the garrison is doubled over and you walk in.
approaches.narrativeHint: The wet sound of men retching in the dark. Nothing clean about this one — measure it by who walks out.
